title: Basically Bone Meal
description: Adds some better versions of bone meal
body:
# What is this mod about?

**Basically Bone Meal** adds:
- Supercharged Bone Meal (insta bone meal something)
- Edible Bone Meal (its just called Bone Meal)
- Infinite Bone Meal (creative mode only)

# Why should you use this mod?
- Why not?
- Bone meal is very yummy
- Supercharged Bone Meal is very good..

# NOTE:
_This mod was made in **MCreator**_
